zh.lifeSummary: 當David Phipps Griffith於1872年7月17日出生在美國阿肯色州勞倫斯拉文登 斯普林斯時，他的父親Joshua Allen Griffith38歲，母親Mary Ann Bailey36歲。他於1891年7月12日與Rosa Cathryn Cartright在美國阿肯色州蘭多夫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他於1910年住在美國德州丹頓嘉絲蒂 普雷可特 2且在美國阿肯色州波爾克懷特 堂史普住了大約20年。他去世於1949年11月10日在美國阿肯色州波爾克凡德賀爾特享年77歲，埋葬在美國阿肯色州波爾克比 福可普利桑特 葛洛夫 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Phipps Griffith于1872年7月17日出生在美国阿肯色州勞倫斯拉文登 斯普林斯时，他的父亲Joshua Allen Griffith38岁，母亲Mary Ann Bailey36岁。他于1891年7月12日与Rosa Cathryn Cartright在美国阿肯色州蘭多夫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他于1910年住在美国德州丹頓嘉絲蒂 普雷可特 2且在美国阿肯色州波爾克懷特 堂史普住了大约20年。他去世于1949年11月10日在美国阿肯色州波爾克凡德賀爾特享年77岁，埋葬在美国阿肯色州波爾克比 福可普利桑特 葛洛夫 其特利。

meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

variants.name: Griff
meanings: English: topographic name for someone living near a pit or hollow, from Middle English grif ‘pit, hollow, narrow valley’ (Old Norse gryfja), or a habitational name from Griff in Warwickshire, Griffe in Derbyshire, or Griff Farm in Rievaulx, North Yorkshire, all probably named with this word.
Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Gryff, a short form of Gruffudd. See Griffith .

variants.name: Kerfoot
meanings: habitational name, probably from Carefoot, near Myerscough (Lancashire).

variants.name: Griffiths
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and western England): Anglicized form of the patronymic (ap) Gruffudd, from Old Welsh Grippiud (see Griffith ).

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Phipps
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a shortened form of the Middle English personal name Philip , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

History: The Phipps family, which holds the titles of marquess of Normandy and earl of Mulgrave, are descended from Constantine Phipps (1656–1723), who was lord chancellor of Ireland. A cousin with a different background, Sir William Phip(p)s (1651–95), was born in ME, where his parents had emigrated. Originally a ship's carpenter, he rose to become royal governor of MA.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

variants.name: Phibbs
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Phipps   with voicing of /p/ to /b/.

historicEvents.title: A Treaty with Hawaii
historicEvents.description: In the Mid 1870s, The United States sought out the Kingdom of Hawaii to make a free trade agreement. The Treaty gave the Hawaiians access to the United States agricultural markets and it gave the United States a part of land which later became Pearl Harbor.

historicEvents.title: Segregation Laws Are Passed
historicEvents.description: A new state constitution was passed in 1876, announcing the segregation of schools.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Texas State Historical Association - CONSTITUTION OF 1876

historicEvents.title: Plessy vs. Ferguson
historicEvents.description: A landmark decision of the U.S. Supreme Court upholding the constitutionality of racial segregation laws for public facilities if the segregated facilities were equal in quality. It's widely regarded as one of the worst decisions in U.S. Supreme Court history.
Historical Boundaries - 1898: Polk, Arkansas, United States

historicEvents.title: The Sixteenth Amendment
historicEvents.description: The Sixteenth Amendment allows Congress to collect an income tax without dividing it among the states based on population.

historicEvents.title: Steamboat Service Established with New York
historicEvents.description: Satilla was the first Deepwater Steamship to arrive at the port of Houston. This accomplishment successfully established a steamboat service between Houston and New York City.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Houston History - INDUSTRY FOR WAR AND PEACE (1910-1920)

historicEvents.title: The FBI is Established
historicEvents.description: The Bureau of Investigation's name was changed to the Federal Bureau of Investigation to help citizens know that the Government is helping protect from threats both domestically and abroad.

historicEvents.title: 1950s Texas Drought
historicEvents.description: One of most intense, costly, and devastating droughts ever recorded in the state of Texas. The entire state was in a state of drought by the summer of 1951. Less than 30-50% of the normal rainfall was received during this period. The state was plagued with dust storms similar to those from the infamous Dust Bowl. The drought ended in a destructive manner throughout 1957; storms, hail, tornadoes, and deadly floods.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Texas Water Resources Institute - Texas Drought: Now and Then

en.lifeSummary: When David Phipps Griffith was born on 17 July 1872, in Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arkansas, United States, his father, Joshua Allen Griffith, was 38 and his mother, Mary Ann Bailey, was 36. He married Rosa Cathryn Cartright on 12 July 1891, in Randolph, Arkansas, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He lived in Justice Precinct 2, Denton, Texas, United States in 1910 and White Township, Polk, Arkansas, United States for about 20 years. He died on 10 November 1949, in Vandervoort, Polk, Arkansas, United States, at the age of 77, and was buried in Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Big Fork, Polk, Arkansas, United States.

ja.lifeSummary: David Phipps Griffithが1872年7月17日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ラウレンスラベンデン スプリングズで生まれた時，父Joshua Allen Griffithは38歳，母Mary Ann Baileyは36歳であった。1891年7月12日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ランドルフでRosa Cathryn Cartrightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1910年にはアメリカ合衆国テキサス州デントンジャスティス プレシンクト 2に，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ポルクウィト トウンシュイップに約20年間住んでいた。彼は1949年11月10日にアメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ポルクヴァンデルボオルトで77歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国アーカンソー州ポルクビグ フォークプレアサント グローブ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: David Phipps Griffith(이)가 1872년 7월 17일 미국 아칸소 주 로렌스 레이븐든 스프링스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joshua Allen Griffith(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ann Bailey(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1891년 7월 12일 미국 아칸소 주 랜돌프에서 Rosa Cathryn Cartright(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1910년도에 미국 텍사스 주 덴턴 저스티스 프레신크트 2에서, 미국 아칸소 주 폴크 휘트 타운시프에서 약 20년 동안 살았다. 그는 1949년 11월 10일 미국 아칸소 주 폴크 밴더보어트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 아칸소 주 폴크 비그 포크 플리산트 그로브 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Phipps Griffith nasceu em 17 de julho de 1872, em Ravenden Springs, Lawrence, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Joshua Allen Griffith, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ann Bailey, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Rosa Cathryn Cartright em 12 de julho de 1891, em Randolph, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele viveu em Justice Precinct 2, Denton, Texas, Estados Unidos da América em 1910 e em White Township, Polk, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América por quase 20 anos. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1949, em Vandervoort, Polk, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Pleasant Grove Cemetery, Big Fork, Polk, Arcansas, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Phipps Griffith родился 17 июля 1872 г. в местности равенден спрингс, ларенс, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Joshua Allen Griffith было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ann Bailey, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Rosa Cathryn Cartright 12 июля 1891 г. в местности рандолф, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он жил в местности джюстаис пресинкт 2, дентон, Техас, Соединенные штаты в 1910 году и в местности уит тоуншип, полк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты около 20 лет. Он умер 10 ноября 1949 г. в местности вандирвурт, полк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности плисант гров кеметири, биг форк, полк, Арканзас, Соединенные штаты.
